free_text: The energy spectrum of neutrons from 7Li(d,n)8Be
As activation detectors a wide range of nuclear
activity was carried out using HPGe detector.
The target was a thick (~ 200 mu-g/cm2) lithium layer
Relative units are the number of neutrons/micro-Coulomb
The STAYSLF program was used for the neutron
spectrum unfolding from the reaction rates data.
Fig.2 from EPJ Web of Conf., 146,11041,2017
Data were presented by Dr. K.V. Mitrofanov.
